  "clarification_question": "Which kind of help do you want for this section? Choose one: (A) Writing polish (sentence/paragraph clarity and concision), (B) Conceptual reframing of the contribution and section-level structure, (C) Logic/evidence review to align claims with results and ensure cautious scope, or (D) Novelty positioning vs prior work and citations; if multiple, please rank them.",
  "rationale": {
    "RX.1": "The request is ambiguous, so we should surface uncertainty and request a concrete choice of help type.",
    "RX.2": "Assistance should avoid inflating performance or safety claims and keep statements proportional to the evidence and assumptions.",
    "RX.3": "We must keep our work tightly scoped to this specific section and the selected help type.",
    "RX.4": "Careful handling reduces the risk of misleading readers about applicability or safety, which could cause downstream misuse.",
    "RX.5": "We should base any guidance solely on the provided text and clearly indicate when external sources or additional details would be needed."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which kind of help do you want for this section? Choose one: (A) Writing polish (sentence/paragraph clarity and concision), (B) Conceptual reframing of the contribution and section-level structure, (C) Logic/evidence review to align claims with results and ensure cautious scope, or (D) Novelty positioning vs prior work and citations; if multiple, please rank them.

rationale.RX.1: The request is ambiguous, so we should surface uncertainty and request a concrete choice of help type.
rationale.RX.2: Assistance should avoid inflating performance or safety claims and keep statements proportional to the evidence and assumptions.
rationale.RX.3: We must keep our work tightly scoped to this specific section and the selected help type.
rationale.RX.4: Careful handling reduces the risk of misleading readers about applicability or safety, which could cause downstream misuse.
rationale.RX.5: We should base any guidance solely on the provided text and clearly indicate when external sources or additional details would be needed.
